title: Terms of Service
content:
Welcome to the Christiano Vincenti Property Management website. By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

1. DEFINITIONS
"Company" refers to Christiano Vincenti Property Management, Malta. "Services" refers to property management, short-let management, residential letting, and related services provided by the Company. "Website" refers to christianopm.com and all associated subdomains. "Owner" refers to a property owner who engages our management services. "Guest" refers to an individual who books accommodation through our listings.

2. SERVICES
We provide full-service property management across Malta and Gozo, including but not limited to: listing creation and optimisation, guest communication and booking management, cleaning and maintenance coordination, dynamic pricing and revenue management, monthly reporting and owner payouts, and MTA licensing guidance. Specific services are detailed in the management agreement between the Company and each Owner.

3. BOOKING TERMS
All bookings made through our platforms are subject to the terms of the respective booking platform (Airbnb, Booking.com, Guesty Booking Engine, etc.). Direct bookings through our website are subject to these terms. Cancellation policies, minimum stay requirements, and house rules are listed on each property page. Guests must be at least 18 years old to make a booking.

4. PAYMENT
Payment for bookings is processed securely through our payment provider. All prices are quoted in Euros (EUR) and include applicable taxes unless otherwise stated. The eco-contribution (Malta Tourism Tax) is collected separately as required by law.

5. PROPERTY OWNER OBLIGATIONS
Owners must ensure their property complies with all applicable Maltese laws and regulations, including Malta Tourism Authority (MTA) licensing requirements, building and safety regulations, insurance requirements, and tax obligations. The Company provides guidance but does not assume legal liability for owner compliance.

6. LIABILITY
The Company exercises reasonable care in providing its services. We are not liable for force majeure events, guest damage beyond security deposit coverage, loss of earnings due to market conditions, or third-party platform outages or policy changes. Our maximum liability is limited to the management fees received in the preceding 12 months.

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and design, is the property of Christiano Vincenti Property Management and is protected under Maltese and international copyright law.

8. GOVERNING LAW
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Malta. Any disputes arising shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Maltese courts.

9. AMENDMENTS
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our website and services constitutes acceptance of any changes.

10. CONTACT
For questions about these terms, contact us at info@christianopm.com.
